prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `009d5c81`.
codex_response:
Implemented task `009d5c81` as a new ARC2 package. The rule used is: detect the single lower `1`-motif, map that 3x3 motif to its target color (`7`, `3`, or `2`), recolor the upper `8` object to that color, and erase the motif. The summary hint was not used because `arc2_sonnet45_summary.jsonl` had no entry for this task, and no new `dsl_ext` primitive was needed.

Code lives in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_009d5c81/__init__.py#L1), [helpers.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_009d5c81/helpers.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_009d5c81/verifier.py#L1), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_009d5c81/generator.py#L1). The generator matches the family by sampling one connected, upper-half `8` doodle within the observed size/density range and pairing it with one of the three official lower motifs.

Validation completed: the verifier matches all official train/test examples exactly, the shared builder produced 1000 verified examples, and I visually checked [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/009d5c81/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/009d5c81/previews/preview_01.png), and [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/009d5c81/previews/preview_02.png). Generated outputs are in [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/009d5c81/task.json), [examples](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/009d5c81/examples), and [previews](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/009d5c81/previews).
